title: centaurea alba subsp. vandasii
intro: Centaurea alba subsp. vandasii, also known as White Knapweed, is a flowering plant species native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of White Knapweed include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Centaurea alba subsp. vandasii are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
